summary: Comprehensive testing of Space Groove Arcade MVP completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly with beautiful disco cosmic design optimized for mobile portrait.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct disco cosmic theme
Phaser game loads and runs smoothly with orbital mechanics
Touch controls working for orbit changes
Leaderboard page with ranking colors and filters working
Coming Soon pages for games B and C working
Custom fonts loading (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Press Start 2P)
